message:
test(tui): snapshot keystroke-driven TUI flows for palette, search→detail, and snippets tab

Adds `tests/tui_flows.rs`, a harness that drives the real `CassApp`
through deterministic keystroke sequences using the framework's
ftui-adapter Model interface and asserts the final rendered view via
`insta` snapshots. Intent: lock the rendered UI against regressions in
input routing, detail navigation, and pane-mode transitions without
standing up a pty.

Test scaffolding:
- `tui_flow_guard` is a process-wide Mutex so concurrent invocations
  don't interleave global state (theme preset, style options). Handles
  poisoned guards gracefully so a panicking test does not poison future
  runs.
- `pin_dark_theme` locks the theme preset to TokyoNight (dark) so snap
  output is stable across local config variation.
- `extract_msgs` normalizes `ftui::Cmd` into a flat `Vec<CassMsg>` so
  Batch/Sequence commands can be driven uniformly.

Three scenarios, each frozen as a `.snap` under
`tests/snapshots/`:
1. `keystroke_driven_command_palette` — open command palette, type a
   query, accept a suggestion; snapshot the final view.
2. `search_open_find_in_detail` — run a top-level search, open a
   detail result, press `/`, type a find term; snapshot the detail
   view showing the find overlay with the fresh (not seeded)
   `DetailFindState` from the same batch's UI fix.
3. `search_to_detail_snippets_tab` — run a search, open a detail,
   switch to the snippets `DetailTab`; snapshot the snippets pane.

Together with the new HTML-export goldens these cover the two primary
user-facing rendering surfaces (export document + TUI view) so future
refactors of either path will surface a scrubbed diff instead of a
silent visual regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+---
+source: tests/tui_flows.rs
+expression: "flow_snapshot(&app, \"keystroke_driven_command_palette\", \"<Ctrl-P> theme <Enter>\")"
+---
+flow: keystroke_driven_command_palette
+keys: <Ctrl-P> theme <Enter>
+state: query="" detail_open=false detail_tab=Messages find_query="<none>" palette_visible=false theme_dark=false status="Theme: Daylight"
+--- frame ---
+ ▐ Search ▌  · Analytics   · Sources  | Alt+A=analytics  Ctrl+Shift+S=sources  Ctrl+P=palette  F1=
+╭ ██ cass · Daylight · Hybrid · Standard ─────────────────╭──────────────────────────────────────╮─╮
+│ ?? │ Search sessions, messages, code across all agents… │ i Theme: Daylight                    │ │
+│○ agent:✎any ○ ws:✎any ○ time:✎all ○ source:✎all         ╰──────────────────────────────────────╯ │
+╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
+╭ Results · 0 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────│╭ Detail · Messages ↩ ───────╮
+│                                                                    ││  ▐Messages▌  │  Snippets  ││
+│                           ██  █  ███ ███                           ││                            │
+│                          █   █ █ █   █                             ││                            │
+│                          █   ███  ██  ██                           ││  ── CASS Preview Pane ──   │
+│                          █   █ █   █   █                           ││                            │
+│                           ██ █ █ ███ ███                           ││Search results will appear h│
+│                                                                    ││                            │
+│                    Coding Agent Session Search                     ││Messages, tool calls, code s│
+│                                                                    ││and conversation context — a│
+│                     ──── Ready to search ────                      ││                            │
+│                                                                    ││      ── Navigation ──      │
+│  ▶ Try: authentication  ·  "error handling"  ·  deploy AND staging ││                            │
+│                                                                    ││   ↑↓   → navigate results  │
+│                       ──── Quick Start ────                        ││ Enter  → expand detail moda│
+│                                                                    ││  Tab   → switch panel focus│
+│         Ctrl+P  → command palette     Tab   → switch panels        ││   F1    → help & shortcuts │
+│          F1      → help & shortcuts    F2    → cycle themes        ││                            │
+│        Alt+S   → search mode         F3    → filter by agent       ││                            │
+│              Alt+A   → analytics           F10   → quit            ││                            │
+╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────│╰────────────────────────────╯
+ status Theme: Daylight · hits 0 · view med-n/cozy · query HYB / STD · perf lat:— cache:cold
+  | Enter=open Alt+S=mode

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+---
+source: tests/tui_flows.rs
+expression: "flow_snapshot(&app, \"search_open_find_in_detail\", \"login <SearchCompleted:1 hit> <Enter> / error <Enter>\")"
+---
+flow: search_open_find_in_detail
+keys: login <SearchCompleted:1 hit> <Enter> / error <Enter>
+state: query="login" detail_open=true detail_tab=Messages find_query="error" palette_visible=false theme_dark=true status="Loaded 1 results in 7ms"
+--- frame ---
+ ▐ Search ▌  · Analytics   · Sources  | Alt+A=analytics  Ctrl+Shift+S=sources  Ctrl+P=palette  F1=
+╭╭ Detail · Messages ↩ ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮╮
+││  ▐Messages▌  │  Snippets  │  Raw  │  Json  │  Analytics  │  Export                             ││
+││ agent ✓ claude_code · ws /workspace/cass · src ⌂ local · score 0.970 (9.7/10) · mt exact       ││
+╰│ msgs:3 msgs · mix:u:1 a:1 t:1 s:0                                                              │╯
+╭│──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │╮
+││Login error investigation                                                                       ││
+││agent=claude_code │ ws=/workspace/cass │ source=local (local) │ score=0.970 (9.7/10)            ││
+││──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  ││
+││hits 1/2  (Enter/n next, N prev, Esc close)                                                     ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││▌▶ User [1/3]  ◎ search hit 1/2                                                                ││
+││▌ login fails after redirect with a visible error banner                                        ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                  ││
+││▌ ✓ Agent [2/3]  ◎ search hit 2/2                                                               ││
+││▌ The error is raised after OAuth callback validation. Retry login after clearing state.        ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                  ││
+││▌ ⚙ Tool [3/3] ▶                                                                                ││
+││▌   tail app.log -> error: oauth_state_mismatch                                                 ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││─ Find / ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────││
+╰│─/error (2/4) · Enter next · n/N prev · Esc close                                              ─│╯
+ ╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
+  | Tab=next Space=toggle

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+---
+source: tests/tui_flows.rs
+expression: "flow_snapshot(&app, \"search_to_detail_snippets_tab\", \"authentication <SearchCompleted:1 hit> <Enter> <Tab>\")"
+---
+flow: search_to_detail_snippets_tab
+keys: authentication <SearchCompleted:1 hit> <Enter> <Tab>
+state: query="authentication" detail_open=true detail_tab=Snippets find_query="authentication" palette_visible=false theme_dark=true status="Loaded 1 results in 7ms"
+--- frame ---
+ ▐ Search ▌  · Analytics   · Sources  | Alt+A=analytics  Ctrl+Shift+S=sources  Ctrl+P=palette  F1=
+╭╭ Detail · Snippets ↩ ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮╮
+││  Messages  │  ▐Snippets▌  │  Raw  │  Json  │  Analytics  │  Export                             ││
+││Snippets                                                                                        ││
+╰│                                                                                                │╯
+╭│Message 1 (User)                                                                                │╮
+││  src/auth.rs                                                                                   ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││                                                                                                ││
+││─ Find / ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────││
+╰│─/authentication (0/0 no matches) · Enter next · n/N prev · Esc close                          ─│╯
+ ╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
+  | Tab=next Space=toggle
